title: US spot Bitcoin ETF approvals reported
content: Multiple US spot Bitcoin ETFs were approved and issuers prepared for launch.

title: Ethereum Dencun upgrade goes live
content: Ethereum Dencun upgrade has activated on mainnet with blob transactions enabled.

title: Solana ETF filing submitted
content: A fund issuer submitted paperwork for a proposed Solana ETF product.

title: XRP unlock alert
content: Large XRP token unlock was observed from scheduled escrow releases.

title: SEC approves spot Ethereum ETF rule changes
content: SEC approved rule changes tied to spot Ethereum ETF listings.

title: Bitcoin halving completed
content: 比特币第四次减半完成，矿工区块奖励下降。

title: Chainlink staking update released
content: Chainlink published an update related to staking and ecosystem participation.

title: Dogecoin whale wallet transfers DOGE
content: A whale wallet transferred a large DOGE amount to an exchange address.

title: CPI and Fed rate concerns pressure risk assets
content: 美联储利率和 CPI 预期扰动风险资产，BTC 跟随市场波动。
